src: 🛠️ 📚💡 This is a detailed and carefully made template for your GitHub projects. It's based on the wide knowledge and practical experience of the engineering community within NHS England. The template includes helpful suggestions, standards and practices - it's something you should consider using for all your repositories.
ja: GitHubプロジェクト向けの詳細かつ丁寧に作られたテンプレート。NHS Englandのエンジニアリングコミュニティの幅広い知識と実践経験を基に、役立つ提案・標準・プラクティスを含む
